text.title: Immersive Design Principles Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Immersive Design Principles to a concrete case.

section.title: Consumer educational VR (15 min lesson)

example.code: Audience: consumer / education. Locomotion: teleport only (no smooth). Session: 15 min lessons; passive break suggested between lessons. Spatial audio: enabled with subtitle fallback + visual minimap arrows. Accessibility paths: seated, single-handed, mono-vision, low-vision-large-text. FOV budget: primary UI 90-110° centred; secondary cues outside trigger a centring nudge.

section.note: Every budget + accessibility path is concrete; teleport-only is the comfort baseline.
